Title: Koltonski, Aleksander
Overview: Giotto scholar; notes about Koltanski's opinions appear in Richard Offner's annotated catalog of the 1937 Mostra Giottesca.
Selected Bibliography: St. Francis of Assisi and Giotto: Art on the Altar of Faith. London: Sampson Low, Marston & Co., 1926.
Sources: Ladis, Andrew. "The Unmaking of a Connoisseur." in, Offner, Richard. A Discerning Eye: Essays on Early Italian Painting. University Park, PA: Pennsylvania State University Press, 1998, p,19, note 1 (Offner wrote as "Khvoskinsky");
